scripts.verify: node -e "const http = require('http'); const req = http.get('http://127.0.0.1:5000/', res => { console.log('Pulse backend status', res.statusCode); process.exit(res.statusCode === 200 ? 0 : 1); }); req.on('error', err => { console.error('Pulse backend error', err.message); process.exit(1); });"
